ABOUT US

A Premier Destination
Since 2026

Welcome to The Anantara Grand, a premium resort and banquet destination located in Mohammadi Kheri, Uttar Pradesh. Established in 2026 under the esteemed ownership of Sri Ramesh Chandra Gupta, our property is thoughtfully designed to offer the perfect blend of luxury hospitality, elegant celebrations, and professional event spaces.

The Anantara Grand features 12 luxurious swimming pool view rooms, a fully centralized air-conditioned banquet hall, modern conference rooms, a sprawling 15,000 sq. ft. landscaped lawn, and spacious parking — all surrounded by serene greenery and premium infrastructure.

CELEBRATIONS

Celebrate Your Special
Moments in Grand Style

From dream weddings and receptions to Haldi, Mehndi, Mundan ceremonies, birthdays, and kitty parties, The Anantara Grand offers beautiful indoor and outdoor spaces that make every event elegant and memorable.

Our poolside celebration zone and lush 15,000 sq. ft. green lawn create the perfect backdrop for unforgettable moments.

WEDDING RECEPTION HALDI MEHNDI MUNDAN BIRTHDAY KITTY PARTY
BUSINESS EVENTS

Professional Spaces for
Productive Meetings

Host your business meetings, conferences, seminars, and corporate gatherings in our modern conference and meeting rooms with premium hospitality services and a peaceful green environment.

  • Team Conferences
  • Corporate Events

WHY CHOOSE US

The Anantara Grand
Difference

01

Prime Location

Centrally located in Mohammadi Kheri, Uttar Pradesh — easily accessible and surrounded by serene natural greenery.

02

Pool View Luxury Rooms

12 exclusively designed rooms with breathtaking swimming pool views for a refined and peaceful stay.

03

Grand Lawn & Spaces

A sprawling 15,000 sq. ft. landscaped green lawn ideal for weddings, receptions, and large-scale social functions.

04

Fully AC Banquet Hall

Centralized air-conditioned banquet hall offering comfort, elegance, and state-of-the-art event infrastructure.

05

Premium Hospitality

Dedicated team ensuring every guest, every occasion, and every detail is handled with warmth and professionalism.

06

Safe & Spacious Parking

Large, well-organized parking space accommodating all guests with ease and security.
